howItWorks.title: How it works
howItWorks.intro: Track which decade of the rosary you're on, across as many intentions as you want.
howItWorks.step1: Add an intention — a person, situation, or thanksgiving you want to pray for.
howItWorks.step2: Tap "Pray a decade" — the app shows you which mystery and meditation to pray.
howItWorks.step3: Each tap of "Next" advances you one mystery; after the 20th, the rosary completes and the counter goes up.
howItWorks.offlineNote: The app stores everything in your browser. No login, no server, no tracking.

privacyPolicy.title: Privacy policy
privacyPolicy.body: This app stores your intentions and progress only in your browser's localStorage. Nothing is transmitted to any server. Clearing browser data will erase your intentions.
